/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/ChatServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/util/myLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/DeepSeekProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/OllamaLLMProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/LLMManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/SessionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/DataManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AIChatServer.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/ChatSDK.cpp.o -o AIChatServer  -ljsoncpp -lfmt -lspdlog -lgflags /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lsqlite3
